title: Applying the double angle formula for sine
text: Recall the double angle formula for sine: $$\sin(2\alpha)$$ $$=$$ $$2\sin(\alpha)\cos(\alpha).$$

title: Identify $$\sin(\alpha)$$ and $$\cos(\alpha)$$
text: If $$\sin(\alpha)$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{3}{5}$$ and $$\alpha$$ is in Quadrant I, what is $$\cos(\alpha)$$?
